mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, discount, amount, date, remark FROM purchase_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, discount, amount, date, remark FROM purchase_record ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, discount, amount, date, remark FROM purchase_record WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, discount, amount, date, remark FROM purchase_record WHERE date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_record (supplier_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, discount, amount, date, remark) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{discount}, #{amount}, #{date}, #{remark})
